# Rizk Corsight, LLC

Rizk Corsight, LLC is an independent studio building helpful, private apps for iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Android: games, collectors' catalogs, and everyday tools that work offline with no tracking.

## Localized site

The website is available in 24 language routes with canonical and hreflang alternates: English, Spanish, French, German, Italian, Japanese, Portuguese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Dutch, Korean, Arabic, Russian, Czech, Danish, Finnish, Hebrew, Hindi, Indonesian, Norwegian Bokmal, Polish, Swedish, Turkish, and Vietnamese.

## Apps

- Inquest — One case. One day. Solve it. A daily fair-play detective game: one mystery opens worldwide at midnight. Examine evidence, interview suspects, file your verdict, and share results spoiler-free. [App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/inquest-daily-detective-game/id6773411439 | Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.inquest.app]
- Rinmath — Daily arithmetic logic puzzle. Rotate three concentric rings so every spoke adds up to the day's target. A calm, daily number puzzle for quick minds. [App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/rinmath-math-number-puzzle/id6767552348 | Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.rizkcorsight.rinmath]
- Sweet Showdown — Ad-free kids baking game. A cozy donut-decorating game for ages 4-6: add frosting, sprinkles, and candy, then show your creation to three funny judges. No ads, no tracking. [App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/sweet-showdown-match-puzzle/id6765767638 | Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.rizkcorsight.sweetshowdown]
- Swaydar — Name the keystone lever. A daily persuasion-deduction puzzle: read one real-world pitch, spot the influence levers, and name the keystone that makes the whole thing collapse. [App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/swaydar-daily-influence-game/id6773167080 | Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.rizkcorsight.swaydar]
- Washi Stash — Never buy a duplicate roll. An offline, private catalog for washi tape collectors. Track every roll's color, pattern, width, and shop, and get warned in Shopping Mode when you already own a similar one. [App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/washi-stash-tape-tracker/id6768124802 | Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.rizkcorsight.washistash]
- Postcard Archive — Private catalog for postcard collectors. Record each card's front and back, place, era, condition, stamps, and postmarks. Search, stats, and a timeline, all on device. [App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/postcard-archive/id6768242841 | Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.postcardarchive.app]
- Plush Bean Tracker — Private, offline plush collection tracker. Add plush as Owned, Wanted, or Trading, with photos, cuddle ratings, and purchase logs. Watch your completion grow, stored privately on device. [App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/plush-bean-tracker/id6772290675 | Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.plushbeantracker.app]
- Plumes — Bird feather ID & field guide. A calibrated, offline feather atlas built on the USFWS Feather Atlas. Identify a found feather, compare it at centimeter scale, and learn the legal context. [App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/plumes-feather-atlas/id6777971290 | Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.plumes.app]
- Brinepost — Sourdough, kombucha, kimchi & yoghurt. A private, offline ferment tracker with day clocks, feeding reminders, a photo log, and a built-in guide for your starters, brews, and batches. [App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/brinepost-sourdough-ferment/id6779179300 | Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.rizkcorsight.brinepost]
- ManualNest — Warranty alerts before they expire. Get reminded 60, 30, 7, and 1 day before a warranty lapses, so you book the repair while it's still covered. Manuals, receipts, and a one-tap Service Packet, offline. [App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/manualnest-home-manual-vault/id6768148223 | Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.rizkcorsight.manualnest]
- Markline — Find & log NGS survey marks. 795,000+ NGS survey marks bundled fully offline. Map them, read the full datasheet, and log every recovery, no account, no signal needed in the field. [App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/markline-benchmark-hunting/id6775235601 | Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.markline.app]
- PuzAI — Jigsaw sorting helper. A private, on-device helper for real jigsaw puzzles. Sort your pile into color buckets, pull out edges and corners, and get honest area hints. [App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/puzai/id6778537289 | Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=ai.puz.puzai]
- PartyPilot — Turn party notes into a host plan. A planning workspace that turns rough notes into a structured host plan: guest counts, quantities, shopping groups, budget, timeline, and invite copy. [App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/partypilot/id6779333856 | Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.partypilot.android]
- Nine Steep — Gongfu tea timer & journal. A multi-infusion gongfu brewing companion: nine grounded presets, an auto-advancing steep timer, and per-infusion tasting notes for serious loose-leaf drinkers. [App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/nine-steep-tea-brew-timer/id6768259757 | Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.rizkcorsight.ninesteeps]
- Elements Lab — Chemistry study, beautifully illustrated. All 118 elements with original illustrations and sourced data, paired with an FSRS spaced-repetition system that schedules each card for the moment you're about to forget it. [App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/periodic-table-elements-lab/id6780071541 | Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.rizkcorsight.elements]
- Cue — Study with your ears. A hands-free, on-device flashcard app. Turn notes into audio cards and get quizzed out loud through your earbuds while your hands and eyes are busy. [App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/cue-hands-free-flashcards/id6778409860 | Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.rizkcorsight.cue]
- Chemorgic — A calm guide to a cleaner home. A private, room-by-room companion offering practical, budget-aware swaps with honest evidence levels. Fully offline, no accounts, no tracking. [App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/chemorgic-organic-approach/id6780579008 | Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.rizkcorsight.chemorgic]
- Cari Art Design — Caricatures drawn just for you. Snap a selfie and watch a friendly character artist draw your caricature live, sketch to color, processed privately on device, with no uploads. [App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/cari-art-design-caricature/id6782975621 | Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.rizkcorsight.cariartdesign]
- Bearing — Know your sky, tides & seasons. Tides, sky, weather, birds & blooms for your region — one calm page, on-device. [App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/bearing-field-almanac/id6777971421 | Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.rizkcorsight.bearing]
- Tidal Pool — Plan the low tide. Meet life. Low-tide windows for 33 US & Canada coasts, plus 73 species cards. No tracking. [App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/tidal-pool-tidepool-timing/id6777971429 | Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tidalpool.app]

## Stores
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/developer/rizk-corsight-llc/id1896065289
- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/developer?id=Rizk+Corsight%2C+LLC
